verbs: 🔫 義体をキャリブレーション中...

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.md ]]; then output=$(markdownlint "$f" 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then jq -n --arg f "$f" --arg o "$output" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":("markdownlint issues in "+$f+":\n"+$o)}}'; fi; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
